title: GreatPreset

abstract: This essay examines what the Great Reset means from a cognitive security perspective, analyzing how global socioeconomic narratives shape public belief and behavior. Through the lens of Active Inference, narrative ecosystems, and information theory, the paper explores how large-scale narrative shifts can either empower or disempower individuals and communities in their sensemaking processes.

methods.name: Narrative analysis and discourse mapping
